permits.description: Full basement renovation: renovate bathroom, plumbing, electrical, insulation, flooring, woodwork and painting. Install washer/dryer. Install eject pump, replace water heater with electric heat pump.Replace tile floor with floating floorReframe basement, insulate with spray foam, blueboard and plaster, woodwork and paiting.Create new bedroom with window well (2nd means of egress)See contract attached for more details.
permits.score_reasons: moderate cost ($55,000); keyword: renovate; minor: water heater; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The permit involves a single basement renovation by an owner-occupant and the recent $1 sale price indicates a nominal title transfer rather than a market-ready flip.
